reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's where you can stop for a while, rest, and refuel.

reviews.comment:
Sin gmc, solo reciben efectivo. Le pongo dos estrellas en vez de una, porque tienen wifi abierto en medio de la nada,el resto, pésimo. Desde higiene, servicio, variedad, falta de Gnc, etc.

(Translated by Google)
No gas station, they only accept cash. I'm giving it two stars instead of one because they have open Wi-Fi in the middle of nowhere; everything else is terrible. From hygiene and service to variety and the lack of gas, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrc2U2YlRnEAE

reviews.comment:
En el local sólo pago en Efectivo. Y la AFIP qué dice??? ¿No es que todos los negocios deben aceptar tarjetas de débito? Este ACA de ENCON, San Juan, debe tener "amigos" en la AFIP

(Translated by Google)
I only accept cash at this location. And what does the tax authority (AFIP) say? Aren't all businesses supposed to accept debit cards? This ACA in Encon, San Juan, must have some "friends" at the tax office.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMUlmVlNBEAE
